web_results.description: As customers grow their sales volume, Stripe’s own revenue rises in step. 3. Google Maps Platform charges developers based on the number of requests made to its mapping, routing, and places APIs. This model lets businesses pay in proportion to how much they integrate mapping into their products. Indirect monetization examples show how APIs grow revenue without direct fees.

web_results.title: Monetization overview | Apigee Edge | Apigee Docs
web_results.description: As an API provider, you need an easy-to-use and flexible way to monetize your APIs so that you can generate revenue for the use of your APIs. Using monetization in Apigee Edge, you can create a variety of monetization plans that charge developers (or pay them through revenue sharing) for the use of your APIs.

web_results.title: What Is API Monetization? - Revenera
web_results.description: This can result in increased customer retention and recurring revenue. Ecosystem Growth: An open API strategy can fuel innovation by enabling a community of developers to create complementary tools, services, and applications that enhance the original offering, expanding the API provider’s overall value proposition. Protecting Margins: APIs can often be called at high volumes, which can drive up costs when the application is hosted in cloud infrastructure. An effective monetization strategy incorporating consumption pre-charging or post-billing can protect the bottom line from being eroded by these costs while also monetizing the value customers derive from API utilization.

news_results.description: The API economy 2026 is about a radical change where APIs are no longer seen as mere technical infrastructure but as business products that can create, distribute, and monetize value.
